reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para hacer un alto en el camino, descanso de campo con el confort de la ciudad!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop along the way, a country rest with the comforts of the city!

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para descansar un rato, algo de arboleda, ideal para nafta, y recargar agua delate, aunque hay q pedirla en el motel. Les falta agregar un termo automático

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to rest for a while, some trees, ideal for filling up with gas, and refilling your water bottle up front, although you have to ask for it at the motel. They need to add an automatic water heater.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBb1lDNEt3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención las habitaciones y el desayunado limpio,se come bien y barato estacionamiento frente a cada habitación techada,muy seguro.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, clean rooms and breakfast, good and inexpensive food, covered parking in front of each room, very safe.

reviews.comment:
lindo lugar, seguro, muy buena atencion y el restaurant de primera y los desayunos para 8 puntos, tenes problemas hablalos que ellos alguna solucion te dan y lo mejor si estas de pasada a otro lugar no te metes en el centro de Bahia

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, safe, very good service, the restaurant is top-notch, and the breakfasts are excellent. If you have any problems, talk to them and they'll find a solution. And the best part is, if you're just passing through on your way somewhere else, you don't have to go into downtown Bahia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnN0pqTm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
un lugar limpio y confortable para tu paso rutero por Bahía! lo mejor es que si vas para la Patagonia no tenés que entrar a la localidad ...tienen un buen restaurante y la atención es excelente, gracias!

(Translated by Google)
A clean and comfortable place for your road trip through Bahía! The best part is that if you're heading to Patagonia, you don't have to go into town... they have a good restaurant and the service is excellent, thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBeXItelZnEAE
